maturity: Trusted demo skeleton; not yet a production-safe or billing-ready MVP.

Real payment evidence, rate limiting, observability, legal pages, and production smoke gates are incomplete.

readingOrder.reason: Learn the product thesis, canonical language, relationships, and truth hierarchy.
Understand mission, controlled subsystems, interface baselines, observations, and lifecycle gates.
Understand the composite Qian, Matt-inspired documentation, and Karpathy workflow plus D0-D3 correction model.
See authority, precedence, reading order, document classes, implementation gate, verification, and handoff as one portable baseline.
Read the frozen product, commercial, architecture, roadmap, and anti-goal baseline.
Compare the frozen target with the latest evidence-based implementation audit.
Resolve the one canonical owner, dependencies, trigger gates, and historical migrations before taking any Issue.
Choose the module document that owns the assigned work and inspect its real maturity.
Load the mandatory architecture, coding, business, permission, deployment, and iteration rules.
Apply explicit assumptions, minimum sufficient design, surgical diffs, and step-to-check verification during implementation.
Check accepted decisions before proposing or implementing a direction change.
Read the relevant operational procedure before deployment, migration, AI, knowledge, or Human Task work.
